GROUP:      example.com
KIND:       ExampleConfig
VERSION:    v1

DESCRIPTION:
    ExampleConfig for testing expandable tree nodes.

FIELDS:
  metadata	<ObjectMeta>
    annotations	<map[string]string>
    labels	<map[string]string>
    name	<string>
    namespace	<string>
  spec	<Spec>
    enabled	<boolean>
    count	<integer>
  status	<Status>
    ready	<boolean>
